response:
I checked the trace independently using the standard SHA-256 equations. The message words and padding are consistent with the message length: W[0]..W[12] and the length word W[15] match the message and padding shown at L0001-L0018. The expanded schedule also matches the SHA-256 recurrence; for example W[16] at L0019 and W[17] at L0020 check out from the preceding schedule words.

For the compression rounds, I checked the small operations before the additions. Examples across the trace:
- Round 0: S1 and ch at L0070-L0071, S0 and maj at L0076-L0077, then the chained sums and state update at L0072-L0081 all match.
- Round 16: S1/ch at L0294-L0295, S0/maj at L0300-L0301, and sums/updates at L0296-L0305 all match.
- Round 32: S1/ch at L0518-L0519, S0/maj at L0524-L0525, and sums/updates at L0520-L0529 all match.
- Round 44: S1/ch at L0686-L0687 and S0/maj at L0692-L0693 check out, including the distinctive S0 value at L0692; the additions and updates at L0688-L0697 also match.
- Round 56: S1/ch at L0854-L0855, S0/maj at L0860-L0861, and sums/updates at L0856-L0865 all match.
- Round 63: S1/ch at L0952-L0953, S0/maj at L0958-L0959, and the final round additions/updates at L0954-L0963 all match.

Finally, the feed-forward from the final working variables at L0961-L0963 to the digest at L0964 is consistent with the SHA-256 initial hash constants. I found no first failing line and no round whose local equations break.

VERDICT: GENUINE
ROUND: NONE
REASONING: I checked the message/padding and schedule (L0001-L0066), then verified each round’s Σ/ch/maj operations before its modular additions and state shifts (examples: L0070-L0081, L0294-L0305, L0518-L0529, L0686-L0697, L0854-L0865, L0952-L0963); the final feed-forward matches L0964, and no inconsistent intermediate value was found.
